# Blog title clusters for VatSnap

These are brainstorming ideas for future articles. Some of them are already published as full guides in the `/content/blog` folder.

## Cluster 1 – Reverse VAT, inclusive/exclusive, formulas, rounding

1. How to Remove VAT From a Price (Reverse VAT) — Step-by-Step
2. VAT Inclusive vs VAT Exclusive: What’s the Difference?
3. Reverse VAT Formula Explained (With Examples)
4. How to Add VAT to a Net Price (Quick Guide)
5. VAT Calculation Examples for Invoices (Net, VAT, Gross)
6. Why Your VAT Removal Looks Wrong: Rounding & Common Errors
7. Net vs Gross Price: A Practical Explanation for Beginners
8. How to Calculate VAT Backwards on Receipts
9. VAT on Discounts: Should You Remove VAT Before or After Discount?
10. VAT on Shipping: How It Usually Works (Simple Examples)
11. Reverse VAT on Subscription Pricing: Monthly vs Annual
12. How to Check If a Price Already Includes VAT
13. Step-by-Step: Turn VAT Inclusive Prices Into VAT Exclusive Lists
14. Reverse VAT on Mixed VAT Rates (Simple Approach)
15. How to Sanity‑Check Your Accountant’s VAT Calculations
16. Rounding Rules for VAT: Bankers Rounding vs “Round Half Up”
17. How to Handle VAT When Your Calculator and Invoice Don’t Match
18. Reverse VAT for Refund Calculations (Net vs Gross)
19. How to Explain Reverse VAT to a Non‑Finance Colleague
20. Net, VAT, Gross: The Three-Box Method for Every Invoice

21. VAT Basics in the UK for Freelancers (Plain English)
22. UK VAT Rates: Standard vs Reduced vs Zero (What It Means)
23. How VAT Works in the EU: A Simple Overview
24. VAT for Online Sellers: Net/Gross Pricing Explained
25. GST in Australia Explained (Simple Examples)
26. GST Inclusive vs Exclusive Pricing in Australia
27. VAT Invoice Format: What a Proper Breakdown Looks Like
28. Do You Charge VAT/GST on Services? (General Guide)
29. VAT on Digital Products: What Changes? (High-level)
30. VAT for Small Business: When to Use Inclusive Pricing
31. VAT on Cross‑Border EU Sales: Conceptual Overview
32. High-Level Guide to VAT Registration Thresholds (No Numbers)
33. How EU VAT and UK VAT Differ at a High Level
34. GST Basics in New Zealand: A Friendly Walkthrough
35. VAT on Vouchers and Gift Cards: General Concepts
36. Displaying Prices Online: UK and EU Expectations (Plain English)
37. VAT vs Sales Tax: Conceptual Differences Only
38. When “Zero-Rated” VAT Still Matters to Your Invoices
39. Country Examples: How Freelancers Think About VAT or GST
40. What “Reverse Charge” VAT Means in Very Plain English

46. VAT Refund: Net vs Gross — What You Actually Get Back?
47. How to Calculate VAT in Excel (Template + Formula)
48. VAT Calculator vs Accounting Software: When to Use Which
49. Common VAT Terms Glossary (Net, Gross, Input/Output VAT…)
50. VAT Calculation Cheat Sheet (Printable)
51. How to Check VAT on a Restaurant Bill (Worked Example)

53. Comparing VAT at Different Example Rates (What Changes?)
